decisions: Used create_app(root) factory so tests can inject a tmp_path root without monkeypatching global state
_read_json helper returns None for missing files, enabling partial-memory responses
GET /api/memory returns only keys that exist; 404 only when all three files are absent
POST /api/approve reads then writes validation JSON in-place to preserve existing fields
Sentinel waiting_for_human.json deleted only if it exists (unlink guarded by exists())
TestClient constructed per test class via client fixture; tmp_root+monkeypatch.chdir isolates each test
Brute-force was already clean; refactor collapsed get_memory conditionals into a dict comprehension
